title: A Dark and Stormy Night
description: Syncs the weather and day/night cycles and adds a unique weather control mechanic.
body:
# ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8cd9500636f52050798e6a8b8425dc6aab256ca.png)
### For that gritty 80s noir aesthetic.

# Features:
- Weather cycle becomes synced with day/night cycle; skies are clear during the day while nighttime is a constant thunderstorm.
- Knife in the Dark - New item used to control the weather; kill any mob with it to make a sacrifice to the Powers that Be, either dissipating the storm or summoning it. Works no matter the time of day.


# Planned Features:
- Some sort of block or ritual to prevent all thunderstorms indefinitely
- Additional Knife functionality - sacrifice specific mobs or with specific items in the offhand for other rituals and functions w/plenty of cartoon violence
- Snoopy plushie
